slides.headline: In 10 years, one yoga studio's Mindbody bill went from $80/mo to $469/mo.
Lock-in is the silent operating cost of every SMB stack.
Mindbody's marketplace takes 23.5% all-in on referred customers.
ServiceTitan early-termination fees in BBB complaints:
Square account-deactivation freezes routinely hold $40K+ for 90+ days.
The cheapest tool is the one you can actually leave.
